stemHtml: According to the principle of operation in an ILS, the difference in depth of modulation will..

options.a: increase from the centre position to half full scale of the indicator needle and decrease until full scale of the needle.
options.b: decrease with displacement from the centreline.
options.c: increase with left displacement from the centreline and decrease with right displacement from the centreline.
options.d: increase with displacement from the centreline.
